title: Smoky Grilled Argentinian Beef Skewers
description: A festive and juicy Argentinian dish featuring grilled beef skewers with a smoky and citrusy flavor, perfect for any Mediterranean-inspired gathering. The addition of blue food colouring gives it a unique and eye-catching touch.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400°F (200°C).
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, parsley, garlic, lemon juice, red wine vinegar, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the beef marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Thread the marinated beef cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill grates with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the beef reaches an internal temperature of 130°F (54°C) for medium-rare.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes.
Drizzle the skewers with a little olive oil and sprinkle with blue food colouring.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
